_comment: TERMINAL-FIRST (2026-06-10): landing on a task focuses its live terminal — typing goes to the session. Plain ↑/↓ walk the queue from anywhere (Shift+↑/↓ sends a real arrow to the pty). ALL action keys below are GATED behind the master (Ctrl+G); bare letters never trigger cockpit actions. In master space, conflicts move to capitals: H/L=rank ±, I=importance, Z=snooze, E=edit, f=set-focus (m/z=maximize, M=merge-PR), X=merge-PR-item, O/N=feedback. Press Ctrl+G ? in-app for the overlay.
_master_comment: COCKPIT MASTER KEY — the single prefix the cockpit intercepts EVERYWHERE (incl. inside the live terminal). After it: o=Overview t=Terminal d=Diff f=set-focus m/z=full-screen ;=switch-pane C/c=new Claude/shell i=quick-prompt (fire a new Claude session in the background) n=new-session q/Esc=back/exit. Ctrl+B is left 100% to the inner tmux. Default C-g (Ctrl+G) is browser-safe; do NOT use Ctrl+W/T/N/1-9/Tab (browser-reserved, can't be intercepted).
